---
title: "{{Paper Title}}"
subtitle: "{{Subtitle}}"
author: "{{Author Name(s)}}"
institute: "{{Institution}}"
date: "{{Year}}"
filters:
  - filters/custom-boxes.lua
format:
  # ── RevealJS (HTML slides) ──────────────────────────────────
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles/revealjs-theme.scss]
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.1
    center: false
    transition: none
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    hash: true
    hash-type: number
    history: true
    keyboard: true
    overview: true
    touch: true
    auto-stretch: true
    smaller: false
    scrollable: false
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    progress: true
    menu: false
    chalkboard: false
    footer: "{{Author}} | {{Institution}}"
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-color: "{{#HEX_PRIMARY}}"
  # ── Beamer (LaTeX/PDF slides) ───────────────────────────────
  beamer:
    theme: default
    colortheme: default
    aspectratio: 169
    fontsize: 11pt
    include-in-header: styles/beamer-preamble.tex
    cite-method: natbib
    natbiboptions: "round,authoryear"
    bibliographystyle: plainnat
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 6
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    keep-tex: true
---


## {{Motivating Question or Finding}} {.smaller}

- First bullet: context and prior work
- Second bullet: the gap or puzzle
- Third bullet: what remains unmeasured

::: {.keybox}
**Research gap:** {{One-sentence statement of what's missing in the literature}}
:::

::: {.notes}
Speaker notes go here. Target: 60 seconds.
:::


## Preview: {{One-Sentence Summary of Main Result}}

::: {.resultbox}
- **Question:** {{Research question}}
- **Finding 1:** {{Key estimate with p-value}}
- **Finding 2:** {{Secondary finding}}
:::

- **Interpretation:** {{Brief theoretical interpretation}}

::: {.notes}
Hit the key numbers. Target: 45 seconds.
:::


## {{Data Description Slide Title}}

- **Source 1:** {{Primary data source and coverage}}
- **Source 2:** {{Secondary data source}}
- **Source 3:** {{Controls or population data}}

::: {.softbox}
{{Panel description: N observations, treatment prevalence, key sample features}}
:::


## {{Empirical Strategy Slide Title}}

::: {.eqbox}
$$Y_{it} = \beta \cdot \text{Treatment}_{it} + \gamma_i + \delta_t + \varepsilon_{it}$$
:::

- {{FE description}}: absorb {{what they absorb}}
- SEs clustered at {{level}} ({{N clusters}})

::: {.highlightbox}
{{Key identification assumption or design feature}}
:::


## {{Main Result Slide Title}} {#main-results}

::: {.resultbox}
|                    | {{Outcome 1}}    | {{Outcome 2}}    |
|--------------------|:----------------:|:----------------:|
| {{Treatment}}      | {{estimate}}     | {{estimate}}     |
|                    | ({{SE}})         | ({{SE}})         |
| Dep. var. mean     | {{mean}}         | {{mean}}         |
| *N*                | {{N}}            | {{N}}            |
:::

- {{Interpretation of key finding}}

[Full Table →](#full-table1){.footnote}


## {{Conclusion Slide Title}}

- {{Contribution 1}}
- {{Contribution 2}}
- {{Contribution 3}}

::: {.keybox}
**{{Bottom-line takeaway in one sentence}}**
:::

::: {.notes}
Deliver slowly. Let it land. Say thank you. Target: 45 seconds.
:::


# Backup Slides


## Appendix Contents {.smaller}

- [B1: {{Backup Slide 1 Title}}](#backup-1)
- [B2: {{Backup Slide 2 Title}}](#backup-2)
- [B3: {{Backup Slide 3 Title}}](#backup-3)


## {{Backup Slide 1 Title}} {#backup-1 .smallest}

{{Content for backup slide — detailed results, robustness, mechanism}}

[← Back to results](#main-results)


## References {.smallest}
